title: [CI:DOCS]: sort swagger operations alpabetically
body:
Use `sort-operations-alphabetically` to sort swagger operations
alphabetically

Wait for: https://github.com/Redocly/redoc/pull/1843
Closes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/7404

[CI:DOCS]
[NO-NEW-TESTS-NEEDED]

@containers/podman-maintainers @TomSweeneyRedHat  This could be merged. Upstream Redocly/redoc#1843 is merged we should see changes whenever `cdn` for `redoc` is updated. There is nothing pending from our side.
